<!-- Thanks for contributing to loopgen! Keep changes small, explicit, and verifiable. -->

## What does this change?

<!-- A short description of the change and why. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] If this adds/changes a template: added a recipe in `src/core/templates.ts` and a test in `tests/generator.test.ts`
- [ ] If this adds an adapter: registered it in `src/core/adapters.ts` and wired it in `src/core/generator.ts`
- [ ] Updated the README if behavior, adapters, or templates changed
